overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character exploring a desolate coastal landscape littered with massive skeletal remains. The character walks from a field of giant ribcages down a rocky slope to the shoreline and wades into the ocean under an overcast, moody sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal skeletal graveyard with massive ribcages

events.description: character climbs over a large bone obstacle while navigating through the ribcage field

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the massive skeletal ribcage field, navigating between giant curved bones rising from the rocky ground

entered.detail: towering curved skeletal rib bones creating a forest-like structure
uneven rocky ground with scattered smaller bones
misty cliff formations visible across the water in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a desolate coastal landscape dominated by massive curved skeletal ribs rising from the rocky ground. The overcast sky casts diffused light across the scene as the character navigates between the giant bones, climbing over obstacles in the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal slope descending to shoreline

events.description: character turns around and walks back toward the camera direction
exiting the dense bone field onto open rocky terrain approaching the shore

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking past the camera, leaving the ribcage field behind and heading toward the distant shoreline

entered.detail: calm ocean water visible beyond the rocky shore
rocky beach area at the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks away from the dense skeletal remains toward the open coast. The terrain shifts from being surrounded by giant ribs to open rocky slopes leading down to the shoreline, with the ocean becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal waters with rocky seabed

events.description: character steps from rocky beach into the shallow ocean water
water level rises from ankles to waist as character wades deeper into the ocean

agents.ego_description: wading into the ocean water, moving from the shoreline into increasingly deep water toward the distant cliffs

entered.detail: gentle ocean waves reflecting the overcast sky
rocky formations visible beneath the shallow water surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks from the rocky beach into the shallow ocean, with water gradually rising to waist level. The skeletal remains fade into the distance behind as the character wades toward the misty cliffs across the water under the dramatic overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate coastal graveyard of giant bones that gradually opens into a vast, misty ocean. It begins with the character navigating between massive curved skeletal ribs rising from the rocky ground under a diffused, overcast sky. As the character turns away from the dense remains, the terrain shifts into open rocky slopes that lead downward toward the distant shoreline. The scene then expands as the character leaves the beach behind and wades into the shallow ocean, with the water gradually rising to waist level. Finally, the skeletal remains fade into the distance as the character moves toward misty cliffs across the water under a dramatic sky.
